label: Review Cards
description: Star-rated review cards in a grid layout. Each card shows a star rating, review title, body text, reviewer name, and optional verified badge. Use for product reviews, app feedback, course reviews. Layout: 2-3 column grid of cards with filled and empty stars, review title, body text, and reviewer info.

reviews.title: Absolutely love it!
reviews.body: This exceeded all my expectations. Setup was a breeze and the performance is incredible. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a reliable solution.
reviews.author: James Wilson

reviews.title: Great product, minor issues
reviews.body: Overall very satisfied with the purchase. The interface is intuitive and the features are comprehensive. Took off one star for the initial learning curve.
reviews.author: Lisa Park

reviews.title: Best in its class
reviews.body: I've tried several alternatives and nothing comes close. The attention to detail and quality of support is outstanding.
reviews.author: David Okonkwo

reviews.title: Solid choice
reviews.body: Does exactly what it promises. Clean design, fast performance, and good value for money. Would buy again without hesitation.
reviews.author: Maria Santos
